title: ayenia catalpifolia subsp. sidifolia
intro: Ayenia catalpifolia subsp. sidifolia, also known as Ayenia sidifolia, is a plant species in the Malpighiaceae family, native to Mexico and parts of Central America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ayenia catalpifolia subsp. sidifolia include relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
